display_text: Muerta Aghanim's Scepter: Dead Shot gains increased damage, expands after ricocheting, and pierces through enemy heroes while fearing them. This upgrade counters clustered enemy formations by creating chaotic fear effects, disrupting teamfight positioning and enabling follow-up damage.
search_text: Muerta Aghanim Scepter Dead Shot fear pierce ricochet anti-clustering teamfight disruption

display_text: Muerta Aghanim's Shard: Grants 30% Spell Lifesteal during Pierce the Veil and permanent 2% spell amplification per hero kill. This upgrade counters prolonged engagements by sustaining Muerta through spell damage while scaling her late-game magic burst potential.
search_text: Muerta Aghanim Shard Pierce the Veil Spell Lifesteal spell amplification sustain scaling magic burst
